onboarding.slide1Body:
Tap a trigger, pick how it made you feel, done.
One moment takes under 5 seconds.
onboarding.slide2Body: TriggerMap connects your triggers and emotions over time, surfacing patterns you might not notice on your own.
onboarding.slide3Body:
Everything stays on your device unless you sign in.
No account required to start logging.

login.subtitleLogin: Your emotional journey picks up right where you left off.
login.subtitleRegister: A safe, private space to understand your emotions.
login.trustText: Your data is encrypted and never shared with anyone.
login.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
login.anonHint: Anonymous mode keeps everything on your device only. Sign in to sync across devices and get personalised weekly insights.
login.privacyHint: Private by design. No tracking pixels. No data brokers. Your patterns belong to you.

prompts.calm: Steady waters. What's on your mind?

log.tapToStart: Tap a trigger to start logging
log.nudgeTrigger: {trigger} has been your most logged trigger this week.
log.nudgeImproving: Your emotional tone has been shifting positively.
log.nudgeDeclining: Things have felt heavier lately. Name what's contributing.
log.nudgeBuildPatterns: Your patterns are building. Keep logging for sharper insights.
log.tooltip: Logging a few moments each day reveals your emotional patterns.
log.bottomStrong: Strong data this week. {trigger} and {emotion} are becoming clear.
log.bottomStrongGeneral: Strong week so far. Your patterns are getting sharper.
log.bottom3Today: Nice pattern data building up. Check your report later.
log.bottomGoodWeek: Good momentum this week. Keep going for richer insights.
log.bottomMoreToday: {count} more today to strengthen this week's observations.
log.bottomDefault: Each moment you log sharpens your weekly pattern report.

emotion.hint: Choose an emotion, then refine with tags
emotion.saveFailedMessage: Could not log this moment. Please try again.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.timeoutMessage: Unable to load timeline. Check connection.
timeline.tooltip: Your timeline shows how triggers connect to emotions over time.

prediction.title: How do you think today will feel?

streak.spark: A spark lit. Keep it going.

weather.descClear: Mostly calm, your recent moments feel settled.
weather.descClearing: Leaning positive, more calm than tension today.
weather.descNeutral: A steady mix, nothing pulling too hard in any direction.
weather.descOvercast: Some tension showing up. Be gentle with yourself.
weather.descTurbulent: Frustration running high, something is grinding.
weather.descElectric: High energy, you're riding a wave right now.
weather.descMixed: Emotions shifting, your inner weather is restless today.
weather.descQuiet: Not much data yet today, log a moment to see your forecast.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, notifications, and data.
settings.signInHint: Sign in to keep your emotional data safe and synced across devices.
settings.premiumHint: Personalized AI insights and detailed charts unlocked.
settings.upgradeHint: Upgrade to Premium for AI narrative insights and advanced analytics.
settings.anonPremiumHint: Create a free account to sync, or go Premium for AI insights.
settings.notificationsBlocked: Notifications are turned off. Enable them in your device settings to receive reminders.
settings.dailyCheckInHint: A gentle evening reminder to log how your day went.
settings.weeklyInsightsHint: Get notified when your weekly pattern report is ready.
settings.gentleNudgesHint: A quiet prompt if you haven't logged in a few days.
settings.exportHint: Exports include all synced and local moments.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently remove all your moments, reports, and insights. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteDone: All your data has been deleted.
settings.privacyHint: Privacy first — your emotional data stays on your terms, always.
settings.aboutBody: Log moments, reflect on emotional triggers, and understand weekly patterns over time.
settings.languageHint: Choose your preferred language for the app.

premium.title:
Unlock your
patterns
premium.subtitle: Turn raw moments into understanding — see what's really going on.
premium.transform1Before: I keep feeling anxious but don't know why
premium.transform1After: Social situations are your #1 anxiety trigger — especially in groups
premium.transform2Before: All my days feel the same
premium.transform2After: Exercise on Tue/Thu consistently brings your calmest moments
premium.transform3Before: I log moments but nothing happens
premium.transform3After: Weekly personalized insights show exactly what's driving your patterns
premium.previewText: When work comes up, you tend to feel anxious — particularly around meetings and deadlines. This pattern appeared 4 times this week...
premium.previewHint: Upgrade to read your full personalized insight
premium.insightsReady: Your weekly insights are ready to view.
premium.subscriptionUnavailableMessage: We couldn't find the subscription product on Google Play. Make sure your app is up to date and try again in a few minutes.
premium.purchaseIncompleteMessage: The purchase was not completed. No charge was made.
premium.restoredMessage: Your premium subscription has been restored.
premium.noSubscriptionMessage: We couldn't find an active subscription for this account.
premium.restoreFailedMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
premium.activeText: Premium is active. Thank you for supporting TriggerMap.

report.timeoutMessage: Taking longer than expected. Check connection.
report.needMoreBody: Log a few moments this week and your pattern report will appear here.
report.noActions: No actions yet. Log a few moments and check back.
report.buildingReportMsg: Summarizing patterns from the past week.
report.unableToLoad: Unable to load report. Check connection.
report.starterSignedIn: A few more moments to go
report.starterBodySignedIn: Log at least 3 moments this week for your patterns to take shape. With 5+, you unlock personalised insights that get sharper the more you log.
report.starterBodyAnon: Log at least 3 moments to see your first patterns. Sign in and log 5+ to unlock personalised insights.
report.signInDeeper: Sign in to unlock deeper insights
report.firstInsight: Your first insight is on its way
report.firstInsightBody: Log at least 3 moments this week to see your patterns. With 5+, you get personalised insights.
report.signInDeepen: Sign in to deepen your patterns
report.baselineForming: Keep logging — your baseline is still forming.
report.logMoreForState: Log a few more moments to see your state of mind emerge.
report.crashRiskBody: Surface metrics look stable but deeper signals are diverging.
report.falseRecoveryBody: Scores look normal but the underlying pattern hasn't resolved.
report.maskingBody: Your reported emotions may not be telling the full story.
report.sameMoments: Same number of moments as last week
report.toneShifted: How your average tone shifted day by day.
report.driftHint: Above zero = better than usual, below = tougher.
report.gutCheckStrong: Strong self-awareness. Your morning read mostly matched the day.
report.gutCheckMixed: Hit-and-miss — your days had more turns than expected.
report.gutCheckOff: Mostly off the mark, but surprises teach you something.
report.actionsOnWayBody: Log at least 3 moments to unlock actions. With 5+, you get personalised AI insights.
report.basedOnPatterns: Based on your patterns. Try one and let us know.
report.signInForInsight: Sign in to unlock personalised AI-powered pattern analysis.
report.unlockInsightsBody: Get a personalised AI deep-dive into your patterns, effect sizes, and behavioural profile.
report.baselineExplainer: Built from {days} days of data. The more you log, the richer this profile becomes.
report.subscriptionUnavailableMsg: Could not find the subscription product. Make sure the app is up to date.

prem.directionHint: One clear step based on your patterns this week.
prem.directionLocked: Sign in to see what your patterns suggest.
prem.directionEmpty: Log a few more moments to unlock a personalized direction.
prem.shiftingHint: Signals that changed since last week.
prem.teaserHint: This is a preview. Upgrade for the full analysis.
prem.modesHint: Personalised movement, nourishment, and perspective suggestions powered by your patterns.

mode.coreBody: Your core analysis is above. Switch to Move, Fuel, or Perspective for personalised guidance based on your emotional patterns.
